user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new interview rounds configuration, so that candidates progress through the defined panels in sequence
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Interview Rounds screen; When I click Add new interview rounds and assign panels to rounds; Then the interview rounds set is created and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter interview rounds by employee class, location, department and position, so that I find the relevant configuration quickly
acceptance_criteria: Given interview rounds exist; When I select filters and click Search; Then only matching interview rounds are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to reset the filters, so that I can start a new search from a clean state
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters; When I click Reset; Then the filters clear and the full list is shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view and edit an interview rounds entry, so that I can review round-to-panel mappings and update them
acceptance_criteria: Given an interview rounds entry is listed; When I click View or Edit; Then I can review or modify its rounds, panel names and applicability

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to see whether a configuration is employee class specific along with its applicability, so that I apply the correct rounds to each group
acceptance_criteria: Given interview rounds exist; When I view the list; Then each entry shows its Panel name, Employee class specific flag and Applicability
